church.name: Fountain of Prayer Ministries
church.tagline: A Prophetic Christian Church serving Hammanskraal and surrounding communities.
church.socialProof: Over 5,000 people have connected with our ministry!

hero.headline: REVIVAL IS HERE
hero.subheadline: A church burning with faith, power, worship, and transformation.

encounter.label: Our Vision
encounter.title: Encounter God
encounter.body: A generation on fire for God — revival, truth, and transformation. When you step into this house, the supernatural becomes normal and your life is forever changed by the presence of Jesus Christ.

pillars.title: Prayer & Deliverance
pillars.description: We break chains and restore lives by God's power.

pillars.title: Divine Healing
pillars.description: God heals you physically, spiritually, and emotionally.

pillars.title: Breakthrough
pillars.description: We help you grow financially, personally, and spiritually.

services.sectionSubtitle: Come in person or listen on air. You can always meet with God.

items.name: Youth & Young Adults
items.description: A generation on fire for God.

items.name: Deliverance & Healing Night
items.description: A powerful night of prayer, healing, and deliverance.

items.name: Evening Worship Experience
items.description: Extended worship, prophetic ministry, and encounter.

radio.label: Radio Ministry
radio.intro: Can't make it in person? Tune in to our weekly broadcasts:

items.note: Get a prophetic word before Sunday service.
A strong word to end your week.

testimonies.sectionSubtitle: God is moving. These are moments you can feel.

about.body: Prophet Prince Thunder leads Fountain of Prayer Ministries with a fire that cannot be contained. Under his leadership, this church has become a beacon of hope, deliverance, and supernatural transformation for Hammanskraal, Temba, Kudube, Stinkwater, and Babelegi.
about.leaderStatement: Here, the supernatural is normal. The broken become whole. We help you walk in your God-given destiny.

finalCta.label: Your Journey Starts Now
finalCta.title:
Your life can change
in one encounter.
finalCta.subtitle: Come as you are. Leave transformed. Join us this Sunday.

contact.sectionSubtitle: We would love to welcome you. Come as you are.
contact.reviewCallout: Over 5,000 people have connected with our ministry!
